=== bd1993-02-25-info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 2/25/93, Belfast, 2CDR

(75min+52min), sbd; some harshness at times; very good to excellent sound [B+]

levels fluctuate and analog drop d1t3 3:2X

CD1
1  I'm Moving On 2 Positively 4th Street 3 All Along The Watchtower 4 Tangled Up In Blue 5 Born In Time 6 Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again 7 It Takes A Lot To Laugh, It Takes A Train To Cry 8 Tomorrow Night (acoustic w band) 9 Jim Jones (acoustic w band) 10 Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic w band) 11 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic w band) 

CD2
1  Cat's In The Well 2 I And I 3 Knockin' On Heaven's Door 4 Highway 61 Revisited 5 Man In The Long Black Coat 6 Maggie's Farm 7 It Ain't Me, Babe (acoustic w band)
